subject: BIOL
course_description: For biology majors only. Permission required (see biology.emory.edu/research-opportunities). Must be taken for 4 credits/semester. Fulfills 4 elective credits (maximum) and upper-level lab requirement for Biology major only upon completion of two semesters.
course_notes: A two-semester research experience for Biology majors. Students will need to find a research mentor to oversee their research project. Once a mentor is confirmed, students will need to apply for the course. (See the Biology Department website for additional information.) Approved students will receive a permission number from Dr. Gerardo. Prerequisites: Biology 142 + 142L and a declared Biology major. Successful completion of two semesters will provide students with four (4) hours of elective credit (the second semester) and the upper-level lab requirement for the Biology major. All eight (8) hours will count toward a student's cumulative hours/GPA.
requisites: (BIOL 142 and BIOL 142L) or BIOL_OX 142WE or equivalent transfer credit as a prerequisite.
